params.name: Era Magazine Vol.1
params.source: Ad Chest (1%), Grandmaster Scrolls (1%), Lottery Machine (0.12%), Relic Forge (100 Relic RF), Wishing (0.1%)
params.description:
On Jun 23, 1923 AD, Hadden changed the magazine name to Era Magazine.

The aim of Hadden's Era Magazine is to let busy people learn more about world events. This is why it contains content on economy, education, law, criticism, reader's letters, religion, medicine, art, and book rewards. It uses a large number of pictures and charts to spread the news in a narrative style, which is different from the conventional newspaper or tv broadcast reporting. Such reporting style is later adopted by news  …
